description: Build, solve, and analyze RASON optimization, simulation, data science, and decision models
name: io.github.FrontlineSystems/rason-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: RASON API bearer token. Required for model management, solving, and diagnostics. Obtain at https://rason.com/.
environmentVariables.name: RASON_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the RASON REST API. /api is appended automatically.
environmentVariables.name: RASON_SERVER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Maximum array/dataFrame rows before solver results are summarized.
environmentVariables.name: RASON_RESULT_ARRAY_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: Maximum solve-result size (in characters) before truncation.
environmentVariables.name: RASON_RESULT_SIZE_LIMIT
